violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoops being stored on top of the ice machine, need to be stored on a surface that can be cleaned and sanitized.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape on the microwave being used to hold the side panel on is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Gaskets on the reach-in cooler underneath the pizza cutting station need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the cappuccino machine in the retail section of the stored needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of single-use items being stored on the floor in the dry storage area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Unfinished construction/remodel, bare sheetrock walls in the kitchen area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath the reach-in cooler needs to be cleaned.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Door leading directly from the outside to the kitchen was propped open and not fitted with a screen.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
